positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic forest scene. The composition is centered, featuring towering, bioluminescent flora resembling stylized crystalline trees and large, geometric fungal pods. The forest floor is covered in gently glowing, ethereal mist. Above the flora, a gentle arc of a nebula in deep sapphire and magenta colors is visible, suggesting a celestial canopy. The overall style should be inspired by vaporwave aesthetics mixed with sacred geometry and Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print composition, maintaining sharp lines, high contrast, and clean, solid color blocking. The silhouette must be clean and easily distinguishable from a single color background. Concept: Stellar Grove. Full body shot, high detail, vector graphic look, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, noise, low detail, watermark, signature, text, logo, gradient wash, photo, realistic, messy, dirty, cropped, out of focus
